title: Website Analytics
text: This page explains how website traffic data can be collected, connected, and analyzed using Google Analytics 4 and related tools.

title: Website Analytics
text: This page explains how website traffic data can be collected, connected, and analyzed using Google Analytics 4 and related tools.

title: Website Analytics
text:
Connecting Website to Google Analytics
Google Analytics 4 can be connected to a website by adding the tracking tag to the site. This allows website traffic and user behavior data to be collected.

title: Website Analytics
section: Connecting Google Search Console to Google Analytics
text:
Connecting Google Search Console to Google Analytics
Google Search Console can be linked to Google Analytics to better understand search performance, impressions, and organic traffic.

title: Website Analytics
section: Reading Google Analytics from Google BigQuery
text:
Reading Google Analytics from Google BigQuery
Google Analytics data can be exported to BigQuery, where larger and more detailed analyses can be performed.

title: Website Analytics
text:
Visualizing Data in Looker Studio
Looker Studio can be used to visualize traffic and conversion metrics such as:

Users
Sessions
Traffic source
Engagement
Conversions

title: Website Analytics
text: Sample Traffic Visualization

title: Website Analytics
text: Sample Conversion

title: Website Analytics
text:
Insights

Direct traffic is the strongest source of users
Organic search and social media also drive meaningful traffic
Engaged sessions make up a large share of total sessions
Conversion metrics help evaluate website effectiveness

title: Website Analytics
text:
Conclusion

Website analytics helps identify which channels perform best, how users behave, and where marketing improvements can create stronger results.

title: Marketing Projects
text:
Sospeso Social Media Content
For Sospeso, I create and manage social media content that supports the cafe’s branding and customer engagement.






Insights

Created content aligned with the cafe’s visual identity
Focused on clear and engaging brand communication
Helped strengthen audience connection through social media storytelling

title: Marketing Projects
text:
Meet the Team Project
This project introduced team members in a way that felt welcoming, professional, and visually engaging.






Insights

Highlighted personality while maintaining a polished brand image
Used editing to improve visual flow and engagement
Supported trust and connection through people-focused content

title: Marketing Projects
text:
Mock Levi’s Campaign
This mock Levi’s campaign reflected the brand’s style while promoting a clear campaign message.






Insights

Applied brand-based creative direction
Focused on campaign visuals and message consistency
Demonstrated marketing strategy and design thinking
